candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicated total line.
Also a valid revenue total, but appears duplicative of Revenues.
This is COGS, not revenue.

variables.notes: Used revenue labels as a priority list; 'Revenues' is most direct and 'Total Revenue' is a duplicate/fallback.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line.
Equivalent COGS label; good fallback.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: Only a component of COGS, not full COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing values
candidates.why: Balancing line, should be excluded when direct COGS exists.

variables.notes: Used direct COGS labels as a priority list; excluded depreciation component and balancing line.

candidates.why: Valid SG&A overhead component.
Valid SG&A overhead component.
Likely overhead bucket; included since no explicit SG&A total row exists.
Depreciation should be excluded from SG&A components.
Could include overhead, but may also include production/R&D labor, so less clean than direct SG&A rows.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the clearest overhead component rows and excluded depreciation-related and potentially overlapping broad labor cost row 'Personnel costs'.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line.
Looks like a secondary/truncated line, not the primary R&D expense label.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense.
Correct concept but appears unpopulated; weaker than explicit populated line.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated amortization of Capitalized development expenses
candidates.why: Balance sheet amortization contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Used direct R&D expense line with the alternate label as fallback. Excluded amortization and balance-sheet development asset lines.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost bucket; includes non-interest items, so not preferred if a more specific interest line exists.
Too vague and appears unpopulated.
Correct concept but appears unpopulated in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Only a lease-interest component, not total interest expense.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest on loans at amortized cost

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the best specific interest-expense row. Chose 'Interest on loans at amortized cost' from the statement preview as the most semantically correct reported interest expense, with 'Interest Expense' as fallback if populated in other years. Manual review recommended because total interest may also include smaller specific items (leases, pension provisions, reclamation reserve). | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest on loans at amortized cost

candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the correct equity label. Selected the owner/parent equity line from the balance sheet preview to avoid double counting non-controlling interests. This is preferable to total 'Equity' because MIB is mapped separately. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to the owners of the Parent Company

Income statement attribution line, less preferred than balance sheet NCI.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred for MIB.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet non-controlling interest labels as priority list; preferred over income statement attribution rows.
